title: aspidium sophoroides
intro: Aspidium sophoroides, also known as the Aspidium fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aspidium sophoroides include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the removal of toxins from the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
